title: Instrument maltais ET Accusé de réception maltais de l'instrument français
text_preview: MINISTERU TAIL-AFFARUIET BARRANIN U TA L-AMBUENT MINISTRY OE FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND THE ENVIRONMENT I-Vic Prim Minisee The Depwy Prime Minisier Excellency, I, George W. Vella, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs and the Environment of the Republic of Malta, hereby confirm that the required constitutional procedures have now been completed, in accordance with Article 12 of the Agreement on Co-operation…

pages.text:
MINISTERU

TAIL-AFFARUIET BARRANIN

U TA L-AMBUENT

MINISTRY

OE FOREIGN AFFAIRS

AND THE ENVIRONMENT

I-Vic Prim Minisee

The Depwy Prime Minisier

Excellency,

I, George W. Vella, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs and the

Environment of the Republic of Malta, hereby confirm that the required constitutional procedures have now been completed, in accordance with Article 12 of the Agreement on

Co-operation in Internal Matters between the Government of the Republic of Malta and the Government of the Republic of France signed in Paris on 9* March 1998.

Your letter dated 2° June 1998 and this reply thereto constitute the completion of exchange of instruments of ratification. The Agreement will enter into force on the first day of the month following the receipt of this Note.

Signed and sealed with the Seal of the Ministry of Foreign Alfairs and the Environment in Vallerta, Malta, this 2 6 day of

a me one thousand mine hundred and ninety eight.

collele

George W. Vella

His Excellency

Mr. Hubert Vedrine

Minister of Foreign Affairs

Paris
